candidates.notes: Alternative community quant to the already-tested LM Studio Qwen2.5-Coder 7B. Storage observed in HF catalog: about 4.28 GB.

Agentic coding-oriented Mistral/Devstral candidate. Heavy for M4 16 GB. Storage observed in HF catalog: about 13.28 GB.
Older IBM Granite code SLM. Low download count but useful non-Qwen 3B comparison.

Apply/edit-specialized small model. Best tested on edit-contract and patch-application style tasks, not general generation.
Larger apply/edit-specialized candidate. Low downloads but directly relevant to patch-apply role testing.
